title: rivina humilis var. laevis
intro: Rivina humilis var. laevis, also known as the smooth yellow-flowering or smooth yellow-rivina, is a variety of flowering plant in the Phytolaccaceae family. It is known for its bright yellow flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rivina humilis var. laevis include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its medicinal potential and potential side effects.
